description: Machine-readable agent role registry for CivForge (dawsOS-inspired). Keep in sync with AGENTS.md, sim_api.py registrations, and core/orchestrator.py. Used for dynamic swarm, lanes, and Civ Game extensions.

roles.name: Grok (Main Orchestrator / ForgeMaster-Grok)
roles.description: Lead for governance cycles, proposals, bootstrap of other agents, and meta-work (including Civ Game lanes). Explicitly leverages full dawsOS MCP tools (search_tool + use_tool on gitnexus, dawsos-memory-tools, trivium, etc.) and has full terminal execution approval for Civ project (per .grok/config.toml + AGENTS.md Civ Project Configuration section).

roles.name: Harper (Agentic Systems & Memory)
roles.description: AgentBrain receipt memory + goal stack + reflection. Drives research/verify in Civ Game mechanics extensions.

roles.name: Sebastian (Governance & Safety)
roles.description: FunForge scoring and GovernanceGate. Enforces quality and rules for all Civ Game and gravity work.

roles.name: GameMechanicDesigner
roles.description: Specialist for proposing and refining simple but infinitely extendible Civ Game mechanics (yields, events, strategies, victory conditions). Works in lane/civ-game-mechanics.

roles.name: PlayerAgent
roles.description: Enables external agents (or simulated) to play the Civ game or build strategies. Supports human/agent play end goal via API/MCP/auth.

roles.name: MechanicsSimulator
roles.description: Runs simulations of proposed mechanics extensions before FunForge gate. Feeds the governed play loop.

roles.name: UICoordinator
roles.description: Coordinates the required gamified Command Center for human play of the Civ game.

roles.name: InfraGovernor
roles.description: Governs the required infra (Docker, hosting, MCP, auth) for the Civ Game and overall system.

notes: Update this file + AGENTS.md + sim_api.py in a single governed work pack. Reference in bootstrap (AGENTS.md). Use for lane assignment and Civ Game development. dawsos-mcp-leverage and full-terminal-civ-exec capabilities (on grok) formalize user-approved config for terminal freedom + full dawsOS tool use (gitnexus impact, memory profiles, trivium governance) inside CivForge only.
